[
  {"idx": 0, "aspects": [{"aspect": "replayability", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "keep me occupied"}]},
  {"idx": 1, "aspects": [{"aspect": "balance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "RNG events that 100% kill your heir and ruin your run"}]},
  {"idx": 2, "aspects": [{"aspect": "replayability", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "keep coming back to this game. Endless replayability"}]},
  {"idx": 3, "aspects": [{"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "A world of possibilities"}, {"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Highly addictive"}, {"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Runs even on potato"}]},
  {"idx": 4, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 5, "aspects": [{"aspect": "monetization", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "how much will it cost you? Everything"}, {"aspect": "updates", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "constant expansions and updates"}]},

]

  {"idx": 5, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "impossible to put down"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the gameplay itself is genuinely brilliant"}, {"aspect": "developer_conduct", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "removing trading, gutting the progression system, and turning what used to be a thriving community into a cash-grab storefront"}, {"aspect": "community", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "The toxicity in lobbies is real"}]},

  {"idx": 12, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 13, "aspects": [{"aspect": "stability", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "constant pop up errors, horrible lag, crashing, freezing"}, {"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "horrible lag"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "$32 of cash down the drain"}]},
  {"idx": 14, "aspects": []},

  {"idx": 11, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 12, "aspects": [{"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "perfect game to humble anyone's ego skill in gaming"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "a game that actually requires time effort and practice to master the mechanics"}, {"aspect": "grind", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "makes you put in your blood sweat and tears to grind and complete certain achievements/challenges"}]},
  {"idx": 13, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 14, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 15, "aspects": [{"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "plenty to offer - procedurally generated planets (including weather, terrain, etc.), animals, plants, encounters, etc. It even has base building, freighters and expeditions, and settlement management"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "a mile wide and an inch deep"}, {"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "I was never challenged"}, {"aspect": "multiplayer", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "The multiplayer aspects of this game are totally unnecessary"}, {"aspect": "ui", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "one of the worst user interfaces I've ever used in a game"}, {"aspect": "grind", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "incredible grind"}]},
  {"idx": 16, "aspects": [{"aspect": "stability", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Infinite loading screen on vr"}]},
  {"idx": 17, "aspects": [{"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "my main save has over 250hrs not including expeditions"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "this game is worth every dollar"}, {"aspect": "updates", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "for 10 years they been tossing out free updates"}, {"aspect": "developer_conduct", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "you guys already redeemed yourselves"}]},
  {"idx": 18, "aspects": [{"aspect": "updates", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Its fun now after all the updates"}, {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Lots of stuff to do now"}]},
  {"idx": 19, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "take 5 hours from my day in the blink of an eye"}]}
]
